mapper.select: SELECT id, name, calories_per_100g, protein_per_100g, carbs_per_100g, fat_per_100g, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM food WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) LIMIT 1

SELECT id, name, calories_per_100g, protein_per_100g, carbs_per_100g, fat_per_100g, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM food
(name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR aliases LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY CASE WHEN category = '主食' THEN 1 WHEN category = '肉蛋奶' THEN 2 WHEN category = '蔬果' THEN 3 WHEN category = '豆制品' THEN 4 WHEN category = '饮品' THEN 5 WHEN category = '零食' THEN 6 WHEN category = '其他' THEN 7 ELSE 99 END ASC, sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC
